zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Blount於1490年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾拉梅時，她的父親Thomas Blount45歲，母親Anne Croft32歲。她和Sir William Clifton至少有2個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1582年7月27日在英國英格蘭米德萊可可藍福德享年92歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾姆斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Blount于1490年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾拉梅时，她的父亲Thomas Blount45岁，母亲Anne Croft32岁。她和Sir William Clifton至少有2个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1582年7月27日在英国英格兰米德萊可可藍福德享年92岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾姆斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Blount was born in 1490, in Latimer, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Blount, was 45 and her mother, Anne Croft, was 32. She had at least 2 sons and 5 daughters with Sir William Clifton. She died on 27 July 1582, in Cranford, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 92, and was buried in Muston, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Blount est née en 1490, à Latimer, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Blount, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Anne Croft, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles avec Sir William Clifton. Elle est décédée le 27 juillet 1582, à Cranford, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 92 ans, et a été enterrée à Muston, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Blount 1490 in Latimer, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Blount 45 und ihre Mutter Anne Croft 32. Sie hatte mit Sir William Clifton mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Juli 1582 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Cranford, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Muston, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Blount è nata il nel 1490 nel Latimer, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Blount, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Anne Croft, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie con Sir William Clifton. Morì il 27 luglio 1582, nel Cranford, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 92 anni, e fu sepolta a Muston, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Blountが1490年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアラティマーで生まれた時，父Thomas Blountは45歳，母Anne Croftは32歳であった。彼女はSir William Cliftonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1582年7月27日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスクランフォードで92歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアムストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Blount(이)가 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 레이팀어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Blount(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Croft(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Clifton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1582년 7월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 크랜퍼드에서 92세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 무스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Blount nasceu em 1490, em Latimer, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Blount, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Anne Croft, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas com Sir William Clifton. Ela faleceu em 27 de julho de 1582, em Cranford, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 92 anos, e foi sepultada em Muston, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Blount родилась в 1490 г. в местности латимир, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Blount было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Croft, 32. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей от Sir William Clifton. Она умерла 27 июля 1582 г. в местности кранфорд, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 92 лет и была похоронена в местности мустон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Blount nació en 1490, en Latimer, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Blount, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Anne Croft, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas con Sir William Clifton. Murió el 27 de julio de 1582, en Cranford, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 92 años, y fue sepultada en Muston, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
